title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 12–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Kizaru, Atlas, Luffy, Vegapunk as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Sanji, you get Gramps outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't stop even if he's moaning about the pain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ouch, Ouch!! stop it! I said it's fine! Leave me, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Simmer down! We'll figure it out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji, get going! You've gotta get to the back entrance!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: VEGAPUNK! DAMN IT! Don't die on me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I think it's a good idea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ek... this is Dr. veganpunk, the world's greatest and most humble scientific genius.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure this message will come as a shock for you all, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please bear with me. What I am about to tell you is the truth about our world!!!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
